zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Harcourt於大約1172年出生在英國奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特時，她的父親Robert de Harcourt21歲，母親Isabel de Camville22歲。她於1192年與John de Limesi Lord of Cavendish在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1212年9月之後在英國，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Harcourt于大约1172年出生在英国奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特时，她的父亲Robert de Harcourt21岁，母亲Isabel de Camville22岁。她于1192年与John de Limesi Lord of Cavendish在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1212年9月之后在英国，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Harcourt was born about 1172, in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Robert de Harcourt, was 21 and her mother, Isabel de Camville, was 22. She married John de Limesi Lord of Cavendish in 1192, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after September 1212, in England, and was buried in Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Harcourt est née environ 1172, à Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Harcourt, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Camville, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John de Limesi Lord of Cavendish en 1192, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après septembre 1212, à Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Harcourt um 1172 in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Harcourt 21 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Camville 22. Sie hat 1192 in England, United Kingdom John de Limesi Lord of Cavendish geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach September 1212 in England und wurde in Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Harcourt è nata il circa 1172 nel Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Harcourt, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Camville, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John de Limesi Lord of Cavendish nel 1192, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il settembre 1212, nel England, e fu sepolta a Warwickshire, England.

ja.Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスタントン ハーコウルト
ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Harcourtが約1172年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスタントン ハーコウルトで生まれた時，父Robert de Harcourtは21歳，母Isabel de Camvilleは22歳であった。1192年にイギリスイギリスでJohn de Limesi Lord of Cavendishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1212年9月以後にイギリスで死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Harcourt(이)가 대략 1172년 영국 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 하르쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Harcourt(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Camville(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1192년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John de Limesi Lord of Cavendish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1212년 9월 이후 영국에서 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1172–after September 1212: ойролцоогоор 1172 он–1212 оны Есдүгээр сараас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Harcourt nasceu aproximadamente 1172, em Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Harcourt, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Camville, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Limesi Lord of Cavendish em 1192, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após setembro de 1212, em Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Harcourt родилась около 1172 г. в местности стантон харкоурт, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Harcourt было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Camville, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Limesi Lord of Cavendish в 1192 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после сентябрь 1212 г. в местности Англия и была похоронена в местности варвиккшир, Англия.

sm.about 1172–after September 1212: e tusa o le 1172–ina ua ma'ea le Setema 1212

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Harcourt nació aproximadamente 1172, en Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Harcourt, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabel de Camville, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John de Limesi Lord of Cavendish en 1192, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de septiembre de 1212, en Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
